steps.title: This is part 1 of a...
steps.instruction: This is part 1 of a 2 part protocol for prepping then loading nucleic acid onto agar plates. It requires both a multichannel and single channel 20ul pipette. Part two can be found [here](https://protocols.opentrons.com/protocol/019a7d_part_2) Explanation of complex parameters below: * `Number of Samples`: Specify a number of samples. Can be any number from 1 to 96 ---

steps.title: 9 ul of backbone mix in...
steps.instruction: 9 ul of backbone mix in slot 4 is added across the Assembly plate in slot 3. Tips are reused then disposed of after this step

steps.title: 1 ul of fragment mix in...
steps.instruction: 1 ul of fragment mix in slot 2 is added across the Assembly plate in slot 3. Tips are not reused and disposed of after each dispense

steps.title: 10 ul of Gibson mix in...
steps.instruction: 10 ul of Gibson mix in slot 1 is added across the Assembly plate in slot 3. The resultant mixture is mixed 3x with 10 ul aspirations. Tips are not reused and disposed of after each mix

steps.title: Assembly plate is manually transferred from...
steps.instruction: Assembly plate is manually transferred from OT-2 deck to an external PCR thermocycler for a 1 hour incubation

steps.title: Part 2 of this protocol is now setup and run
steps.instruction: Part 2 of this protocol is now setup and run. It can be found here
